text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While walking down the hallway, I catch a glimpse
of Mejiro Ryan deep in thought.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Hmm... I wonder if anyone would come with me...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oh, hey, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I was gonna go to the aquarium this weekend, but
my friend can't make it anymore.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
The tickets I got are about to expire too, so I'm
trying to figure out what to do.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oh, wait a sec. Are you free this weekend?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Do you wanna go to the aquarium with me?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Wooow... It's such a magical place!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
All those colorful fish—it's like an underwater
field of flowers!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and did you know? Aquariums are the new
hot spot to go.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, because every aquarium has their own
unique thing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
One might have a huge variety of jellyfish, and
another one might let you touch the dolphins.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: It looks like this aquarium has a lot of strange and rare animals.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
See, it's even written on the signs. "A Collection
of Mysterious Creatures! Wildly Exciting!"

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I wonder what they've got! Let's go and see!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
There's beautiful fish, weird-looking fish... The
variety here really is amazing!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: What else do they got... Hmmm...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oh?
choice_data_list: Did you find a strange one?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: N-no, it's not that. But when I look around...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
D-doesn't it seem like there are only... c-couples
in here?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
True to her word, there are many young couples
around us enjoying the aquarium.
choice_data_list: I guess aquariums really are hot spots.
I guess aquariums really are hot spots.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Aw, geez. I didn't even think about that, but I
guess it makes sense.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Whoa, those two are really getting close...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I gotta stop starin'! I came here to look at the fish!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
...Wow. That couple's walking with their arms
around each other.
choice_data_list: Let's focus on what's happening in the water.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah! Nothing hits the spot better than a nice
sports drink!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Gulp, gulp... Ahhh!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Phew... That settled me down. Seeing all those
couples caught me off guard.

text_block_list.name: One Half of a Couple
text_block_list.text: Are you tired from walking? Let's take a break.

text_block_list.name: Other Half of a Couple
text_block_list.text: Okay... Mind if I lean against you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Gasp!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
T-Trainer! I'm all good now, so let's get outta
here!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Phew... I don't know why, but I'm feeling pretty
beat.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Is this what the "wildly exciting" part of that sign
was about?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't think that was what they meant, but
nevertheless, I enjoy my time at the aquarium
with Mejiro Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah! I'll focus my attention on the water and
see what's up inside the tank...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Yikes!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's n-nothing! Nothing at all!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Our eyes just met in the reflection of the glass...
and it was like...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: It was just like that one scene in volume six of Marine Lover!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Their eyes meet in the reflection... and that's
when they first realize how the other feels.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, sorry. I'm getting all distracted. I should focus
on the fish!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ryan glances back into the tank.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: What in the—I keep locking eyes with you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Is this what that sign meant by "wildly exciting"?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I enjoy my time at the aquarium with Mejiro Ryan,
who has no trouble getting excited all on her own.
